title: oxytropis campestris subsp. sordida
intro: Oxytropis campestris subsp. sordida, also known as the mountain milkvetch, is a perennial plant species belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Oxytropis campestris subsp. sordida include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and pneumonia, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, which are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
